problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
